title: tragacantha subulata
intro: Tragacantha subulata, also known as the yellow rattle or cucko flower, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the digestive system and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The plant is used to promote health benefits such as improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. Tragacantha subulata is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and is also used in dried form or as a tincture in various folk remedies.
